description: Structure of Karamba input items for Generator (what the gen script output must provide).
line_elements: List of line members: top chord, bottom chord, diagonals. Each: start/end node indices or coordinates.
support: Support points: node indices or coordinates, support type (pinned/fixed/roller).
loads: Load forces applied at load points: Fx, Fy, Fz per point (kN).
load_points: Nodes where lines meet and where forces are applied (coordinates or node ids).
